content: I am a PhD student at the Vancouver School of Economics at the University of British Columbia. My fields of interests are labor economics and applied econometrics, with a particular focus on informality in labor markets, and difference-in-differences designs. I received a Master in Economics from UBC and a Bachelor in Economics from Universidad de Piura.

title: Paul Corcuera
